title: Conclave
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Conclave''' was one of two political councils of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]]. It was primarily concerned with [[Ssi-ruuvi religion|religious issues]], but also appeared to have judicial and legislative powers. The Conclave was occupied by [[Ssi-ruu#Gold|gold Ssi-ruu]].

Together with the [[Elders' Council]], the Council elected the [[Shreeftut]]. The Council and the Conclave were bitter rivals over which was to be the dominant power in the Imperium, and often it was only the shreeftut's influence that prevented civil war.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1stm}}
